zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Tyndall於1476年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Sir William Tyndale36歲，母親Dame Mary Montfort36歲。他於1504年與Lady Amphyllis Amphelice Coningsby在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和11個女兒的父母。他去世於1539年10月1日在英國格盧斯特斯爾武利享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Tyndall于1476年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Sir William Tyndale36岁，母亲Dame Mary Montfort36岁。他于1504年与Lady Amphyllis Amphelice Coningsby在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和11个女儿的父母。他去世于1539年10月1日在英国格盧斯特斯爾武利享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tyndall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Tindall
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lincolnshire): habitational name from Tynedale, the valley of the river Tyne, or from a place in Cumbria called Tindale, which is situated on a tributary of the South Tyne. The name derives from a British river name Tina (apparently from a Celtic root meaning ‘to flow’) + Old English dæl or Old Norse dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Tyndall was born in 1476, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Tyndale, was 36 and his mother, Dame Mary Montfort, was 36. He married Lady Amphyllis Amphelice Coningsby in 1504, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 11 daughters. He died on 1 October 1539, in Uley, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Tyndall est né en 1476, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Tyndale, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Dame Mary Montfort, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Lady Amphyllis Amphelice Coningsby en 1504, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 11 filles. Il est décédé le 1 octobre 1539, à Uley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

Lui sposato Lady Amphyllis Amphelice Coningsby nel 1504, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 11 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Tyndallが1476年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir William Tyndaleは36歳，母Dame Mary Montfortは36歳であった。1504年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでLady Amphyllis Amphelice Coningsbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と11人の娘の親であった。彼は1539年10月1日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウリーで63歳で死去した。

ko.Hockwold cum Wilton, King's Lynn, Norfol: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 호ck울드 쿠 윌턴
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Tyndall(이)가 1476년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Tyndale(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Dame Mary Montfort(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1504년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Lady Amphyllis Amphelice Coningsby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1539년 10월 1일 영국 그루스스터실르 울리에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Amphyllis Amphelice Coningsby em 1504, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 11 filhas. ru.Hockwold cum Wilton, King's Lynn, Norfol: хоккволд кум уилтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Tyndall родился в 1476 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Tyndale было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Dame Mary Montfort, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Amphyllis Amphelice Coningsby в 1504 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 11 дочерей. Он умер 1 октября 1539 г. в местности ули, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.
